since_last: 38% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.90%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.30% · BTC -1.87% · Gold -1.25% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 38% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.90%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.90%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.44%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.44%, ANET +7.29%, BIDU +5.37%, SMCI +5.24%, AVGO +5.23%. Laggards: PANW -5.58%, UPST -4.26%, ZS -4.07%, WDAY -3.91%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.53% at $145.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
